name: Raisin Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine raisins and water. Cook until the raisins are plump.
2. Drain the raisins and set aside, reserving 10 tablespoons of cooking liquid.
3. In a mixing bowl, cream shortening and sugar.
4. Combine flour, cinnamon, cloves, nutmeg, and salt; set aside.
5. In a separate bowl, combine buttermilk or sour milk, baking soda, beaten eggs, and reserved cooking liquid.
6. Add the dry ingredients alternately with the milk mixture to the creamed mixture. Stir in the cooked raisins.
7. Pour the batter into a greased 13-inch x 9-inch x 2-inch baking pan.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35 to 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
9. Cool on a wire rack.
10. Just before serving, sprinkle with confectioner's sugar.
